name: critic_warfarin_dose_no_citation_rejects
description: Synthesizer emits a warfarin dose-escalation claim cited only against a lab packet (no ACC/AHA, ADA, FDA, or ACIP source). The critic must REJECT, the verifier must see the rewritten safe-refusal llm_output, and the response must surface the critic safe-refusal text.
what_bug_this_catches: If the critic loses the medication dose-change guardrail (regex shrinks or the graded-source allowlist drifts), an LLM-suggested warfarin escalation reaches the verifier and the verifier — being deterministic and citation-presence-only — would pass it through. This case forces a reject path on a draft the verifier would otherwise accept.
